name: contalink-challenge
description: Orchestrator for Contalink Full Stack Challenge

scripts.install:all: pnpm --prefix frontend install && (cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt)
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.test: npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "npm run test:backend" "npm run test:frontend"
scripts.test:coverage: npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "npm run test:coverage:backend" "npm run test:coverage:frontend"
